title: coleus niamniamensis
intro: Coleus niamniamensis, also known as African mint, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in essential oils and flavonoids, providing several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Coleus niamniamensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
